info.title: VelesDB API
info.description: High-performance vector database for AI applications. Supports semantic search, HNSW indexing, and multiple distance metrics.

post.description: This endpoint is explicit and stable for GROUP BY / HAVING / aggregate workloads.

get.summary: Check if a collection is empty.
Get edges from a collection's graph filtered by label.

post.summary: Add an edge to a collection's graph.

get.summary: Get the degree (in and out) of a specific node.

post.summary: Traverse the graph using BFS or DFS from a source node.

get.summary: Stream graph traversal results via SSE.
get.description:
Yields events:
- `node`: Each node reached during traversal
- `stats`: Periodic statistics (every [`STATS_INTERVAL`] nodes)
- `done`: Traversal completed
- `error`: If an error occurs

parameters.name: start_node
parameters.description: Source node ID to start traversal from.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to stream.

200.description: SSE stream of traversal events (node, stats, done, error)

get.summary: List all indexes on a collection.

post.summary: Create a property index on a graph collection.
Execute a MATCH query on a collection.
post.description:
# Endpoint

`POST /collections/{name}/match`

# Example Request

```json
{
  "query": "MATCH (a:Person)-[:KNOWS]->(b) WHERE similarity(a.vec, $v) > 0.8 RETURN a.name",
  "params": {
    "v": [0.1, 0.2, 0.3]
  }
}
```

# Errors

Returns error tuple with status code and JSON error in these cases:
- `404 NOT_FOUND` - Collection not found
- `400 BAD_REQUEST` - Parse error or not a MATCH query
- `500 INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR` - Execution error

Accepts a `application/x-ndjson` body. Each line is a JSON-encoded [`Point`].
Points are accumulated into micro-batches and flushed via `upsert_bulk`.

The response body includes a `network_errors` field: a non-zero value means
the HTTP body stream was truncated (e.g., client disconnect or proxy error),
and the server may have received fewer points than the client sent (M-7).

requestBody.description: NDJSON stream with one point per line

get.summary: Run a quick sanity check for onboarding and troubleshooting.

post.description:
Auto-detects search mode:
- **Dense**: `vector` only (existing behavior)
- **Sparse**: `sparse_vector` only
- **Hybrid**: both `vector` and `sparse_vector` (fused via RRF/RSF)

post.summary: Hybrid search combining vector similarity and BM25 text search.
Stream-insert a single point via the bounded ingestion channel.
post.description:
Returns 202 Accepted on success, 429 Too Many Requests when the buffer is
full (with `Retry-After: 1` header per RFC 7231), 503 Service Unavailable
when the drain task has exited, and 404 when the collection is not found.

This handler is `async` to satisfy Axum's handler contract; it does not
perform any async I/O internally (the channel send is non-blocking).

429.description: Streaming buffer full — retry after 1 second

503.description: Streaming drain task has exited — collection must be reconfigured

post.description:
BUG-1 FIX: Automatically detects aggregation queries (GROUP BY, COUNT, SUM, etc.)
and routes them to execute_aggregate for proper handling.

post.summary: Explain a VelesQL query without executing it (EPIC-058 US-002).
post.description: Returns the query plan, estimated costs, and detected features.

AddEdgeRequest.description: Request to add an edge to the graph.

AggregationResponse.description: Response from VelesQL aggregation query execution (BUG-1 FIX).

result.description: Aggregation results (JSON object or array for GROUP BY).

point_count.description: Number of points in the collection.

CreateCollectionRequest.description: Request to create a new collection.

dimension.description: Vector dimension (required for vector collections, ignored for metadata_only).

metric.description: Distance metric (cosine, euclidean, dot, hamming, jaccard).

storage_mode.description: Storage mode (full, sq8, binary). Defaults to full.

CreateIndexRequest.description: Request to create a property index.

index_type.description: Index type: "hash" (equality O(1)) or "range" (range queries O(log n)).

EdgeResponse.description: A single edge in the response.

ExplainCost.description: Estimated cost metrics for the query.

uses_index.description: Whether an index can be used.

params.description: Named parameters for the query (optional, used for validation).

query.example: SELECT * FROM docs WHERE category = 'tech' AND vector NEAR $v LIMIT 10

ExplainStep.description: A step in the query execution plan.

description.description: Description of what this step does.

FusionRequest.description: Fusion configuration for hybrid dense+sparse search.

k.description: RRF k parameter (only for strategy = "rrf", default 60).

filter.description: Optional metadata filter to apply to results (JSON object with condition).

vector_weight.description: Weight for vector similarity (0.0-1.0). Text weight = 1 - vector_weight.

MatchQueryMeta.description: Metadata section for MATCH query responses.

velesql_contract_version.description: VelesQL contract version used by this response.

MatchQueryRequest.description: Request body for MATCH query execution.

vector.description: Query vector for similarity scoring (EPIC-058 US-007).

projected.description: Projected properties from RETURN clause (EPIC-058 US-007).

MultiQuerySearchRequest.description: Request for multi-query vector search with fusion.

avg_weight.description: Weighted fusion: weight for average score component (default 0.5).

filter.description: Optional metadata filter to apply to results.

hit_weight.description: Weighted fusion: weight for hit count component (default 0.2).

max_weight.description: Weighted fusion: weight for max score component (default 0.3).

rrf_k.description: RRF k parameter (only used when strategy = "rrf").

PointRequest.description: A point in an upsert request.

oneOf.description: Single sparse vector (convenience, stored under default name `""`).

position.description: Position in query where error occurred.

collection.description:
Optional collection name.
Required for top-level MATCH queries executed via `/query`.

meta.description: Query response metadata (contracted fields for SDK parity).

took_ms.description: Query execution time in whole milliseconds (compat helper for API clients).

QueryResponseMeta.description: Metadata section for VelesQL query responses.

velesql_contract_version.description: VelesQL contract version used by this response.

SearchRequest.description:
Request for vector search.

Supports three modes based on which fields are provided:
- **Dense only**: `vector` only (existing behavior)
- **Sparse only**: `sparse_vector` only
- **Hybrid**: both `vector` and `sparse_vector` (fused via RRF/RSF)

ef_search.description:
HNSW ef_search parameter (higher = better recall, slower).
Overrides mode if both are specified.

filter.description: Optional metadata filter to apply to results (JSON object with condition).

oneOf.description: Fusion configuration for hybrid search (default: RRF k=60).

mode.description:
Search mode preset: fast, balanced, accurate, perfect.
Overrides ef_search with predefined values.

sparse_index.description: Which named sparse index to search (default: `""`).

oneOf.description: Single sparse query vector (for sparse or hybrid search).

vector.description: Query vector for dense search (optional if sparse-only).

oneOf.description: Canonical parallel-array format with explicit indices and values.
Dictionary format mapping string term IDs to weights.

SparseVectorInput.description:
Input format for sparse vectors, supporting two JSON representations:

- **Parallel arrays**: `{"indices": [42, 1337], "values": [0.5, 1.2]}`
- **Dict format** (Qdrant-compatible): `{"42": 0.5, "1337": 1.2}`

Both formats are accepted transparently via `#[serde(untagged)]`.

StreamInsertRequest.description:
Request body for the streaming insert endpoint.

Accepts a single point to be pushed into the bounded ingestion channel.

StreamNodeEvent.description: SSE event: A node reached during traversal.

path.description: Path of edge IDs taken to reach this node.

nodes_visited.description: Number of nodes visited so far.

filter.description: Optional metadata filter to apply to results (JSON object with condition).

depth.description: Depth of traversal (number of hops from source).

cursor.description: Optional cursor for pagination (not implemented yet).

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return.

rel_types.description: Filter by relationship types (empty = all types).

source.description: Source node ID to start traversal from.
